arts.ttl: Arsenal face Barcelona competition for potential €50million attacker transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal may reportedly not be the only club considering the transfer of €50million-rated Aston Villa striker Jhon Duran, according to journalist Ekrem Konur. Writing on X, formerly Twitter, Konur explained that Barcelona are now also showing an interest in the Colombia international as they look at possible long-term replacements for veteran front-man Robert Lewandowski. arts.ttl: Arsenal guaranteed to be without seven players for Bolton as Mikel Arteta faces triple decision
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta will have two new players unavailable for the Carabao Cup clash against Bolton following on from a chaotic draw against Manchester City. Ahead of the cup tie, Arteta was asked for the latest team news and though his answer was understandably coy, he did confirm that one player is a huge doubt.

arts.ttl: Man City dealt a huge blow as Premier League champions confirm star midfielder Rodri suffered a serious knee injury in grudge match with Arsenal
arts.sum: Rodri hobbled off in the first half after going down without appearing to be touched while sprinting to the near post to try and meet a corner. He was left writhing in agony as he received treatment.

arts.ttl: Arsenal join the race for Bayer Leverkusen’s Florian Wirtz
arts.sum: Sport Bild (via @iMiaSanMia) reports that Arsenal are the next team to join the race for Bayer Leverkusen talisman Florian Wirtz as he looks to take the next step in…

arts.ttl: Three Arsenal youngsters look set to be involved vs Bolton after Under-21s line-up hint - opinion
arts.sum: Ismeal Kabia, Josh Nichols and Tommy Setford all look set to feature in Mikel Arteta's Arsenal squad to face Bolton.

arts.ttl: Premier League make massive Michael Oliver referee decision after Man City vs Arsenal controversy
arts.sum: Taylor was absent from last weekend's refereeing roster following a contentious match between Chelsea and Bournemouth the previous week, which saw a record 14 yellow cards issued. Michael Oliver and Anthony Taylor are set to return to refereeing duties in the Premier League's sixth week, as confirmed by England's top flight.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland was 'rattled' by Arsenal star before furious post-match bust-up
arts.sum: Man City striker Erling Haaland and Arsenal defender Gabriel were involved in a physical battle throughout Sunday's epic 2-2 draw between the title rivals, with the latter getting under the skin of the former, according to a Premier League legend

arts.ttl: The relationship with Mikel Arteta ‘doesn’t change’, says Pep Guardiola
arts.sum: Guardiola’s Manchester City and Arteta’s Arsenal battled out a fiery 2-2 draw at the Etihad Stadium on Sunday.

arts.ttl: 'Huge blow': ESPN pundit predicts if Arsenal will win the title now Rodri is injured for Man City
arts.sum: Arsenal’s 2-2 draw against Manchester City at the Etihad Stadium last weekend may have changed the landscape of things in the Premier League title race....

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Newcastle United plan contract talks as Liverpool & Arsenal hover for potential transfer
arts.sum: Newcastle United have been planning talks with Anthony Gordon over a new contract for some time now, and that remains a priority for them even if these discussions are not currently looking imminent, CaughtOffside understands.
